package_title: I will automate PDF extraction & data entry with free open-source tools
description:
🔧 I will automate PDF extraction & data entry with free open-source tools

I deliver a workflow that turns messy PDFs/invoices into clean CSV/JSON — zero manual typing using Stirling-PDF + Docling + n8n + your doc-extractor skill — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• Charge $99–$299 setup + $49–$149/mo; your cost $0 (self-hosted)
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($37, 3 days, 1 rev): Single template, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($149, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 templates, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($298, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited templates, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your document types/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the automation
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
